code:
import io
import string

type Color =
  | Red
  | Green
  | Yellow

fn next_color(_ c: Color) -> Color
  match c
  when Red
    Color.Green
  when Green
    Color.Yellow
  when Yellow
    Color.Red
  end
end

fn color_name(_ c: Color) -> String
  match c
  when Red
    "Red"
  when Green
    "Green"
  when Yellow
    "Yellow"
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut state = Color.Red
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(l)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(l)
    for token in tokens
      state = next_color(state)
    end
  when None
    state = state
  end
  print(color_name(state))
end
